ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I participated in a group plan to be safe while drinking
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I suggested that someone eat before drinking
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I arranged for someone or myself to be the designated driver or sober person
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I stayed with someone who looked very intoxicated, so they were not alone
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I brought water or other non-alcoholic beverages to someone
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I took care of someone when they got sick
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I found someone a safe place to sleep when they had too much to drink
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I made sure someone got the intoxicated person home
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I later checked in with someone I knew had a lot to drink the night before to see if they were okay
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Bystanders to Alcohol Risk Scales - Factor 1 Total Score
Notes: Sum of bars_f1_1 through bars_f1_9

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I asked someone to stop drinking or slow down a bit
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I told a person serving alcohol to cut someone off
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I alerted someone (e.g., host of party, bouncer, security guard) about an intoxicated person
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I spoke up when I heard someone talking about something dangerous they did while drunk
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I told someone whose drinking I was concerned about that I was available for help and support
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I talked with someone who was drinking too much about the warning signs
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I talked to a person's friends about that person's behavior when they drink too much
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Which of the following have you done in the past 3 months - I suggested someone talk to a professional counselor
Notes: 0=Not in the past 3 months; 1=Once; 2=Twice; 3=3 or more times

ElementDescription: Bystanders to Alcohol Risk Scales - Factor 2 Total Score
Notes: Sum of bars_f2_1 through bars_f2_8

ElementDescription: Bystanders to Alcohol Risk Scales - Total Score
Notes: Sum of bars_f1_1 through bars_f1_9 and bars_f2_1 through bars_f2_8
